title: Global Markets Brief — 10 Jul 2026
intro: Risk-on sentiment dominates Asian trade as tech equities rally on AI optimism while USD weakens across the board amid expectations of Fed policy pivot.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Risk-on sentiment dominates Asian trade as tech equities rally on AI optimism while USD weakens across the board amid expectations of Fed policy pivot.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
NZD +0.24% — Commodity currency strength on improved risk appetite
GBP +0.16% — Sterling supported by resilient UK economic data expectations
AUD +0.13% — Risk-on flows benefit antipodean currencies
EUR +0.07% — Modest gains as dollar weakens broadly
CHF +0.16% — Safe haven demand eases slightly
CAD +0.06% — Loonie supported despite oil weakness
JPY +0.37% — Yen gains as carry trades unwind modestly
USD -0.10% (avg) — Greenback softer on dovish Fed repricing

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1442 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: 1.1400 support and 1.1500 resistance
USDJPY 161.7520 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: 162.00 intervention zone risk remains elevated
GBPUSD 1.3426 | Bias: LONG | Watch: 1.3450 breakout potential on Cable momentum

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
S&P 500 5751.71 +0.85% — Broad-based rally supported by mega-cap tech strength
Nasdaq 26207 +1.30% — AI-related names drive outperformance in growth stocks
Nikkei 225 68558 +1.20% — Japanese equities benefit from corporate earnings optimism
DAX 25153 +0.14% — European markets lag Asian and US counterparts

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold 4122.90 -0.43% — Profit-taking after recent highs as real yields tick higher
WTI Crude 71.52 -0.78% — Supply concerns ease while demand outlook remains mixed
Silver 60.53 -0.36% — Industrial metal follows gold lower in technical correction

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin 63896 +1.13% — BTC rebounds above 63k as institutional flows return and correlation with tech equities strengthens
Ethereum 1772.48 +1.62% — ETH outperforms on anticipated network upgrade momentum and DeFi activity pickup

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: GBPUSD | 1.3400-1.3420 | Sterling momentum building with bullish technical setup
LONG: Nasdaq | 26000-26100 | Tech rally has room to run on earnings season optimism
SHORT: Gold | 4130-4150 | Overbought conditions warrant correction toward 4080 support
SHORT: WTI Crude | 72.00-72.50 | Downside pressure persists on demand concerns

sections.content: US Consumer Sentiment Prelim | 16:00 CET | High impact
